gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/43)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/43)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الْكَبَائِرُ فِيهَا اسْتِثْنَاءُ أَنْ يَغْفِرَ لِمَنْ يَشَاءُ قَالَ نَعَمْ .

en.hubeali: Yunus, from Is’haq Bin Ammar who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The major sins, are there excepts in these that He<sup>azwj</sup> would Forgive for the one whom He<sup>azwj</sup> so Desires to?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’.
en.sarwar: 19. Yunus has narrated from Ishaq ibn ‘ Ammar who has said the following: “Once I asked abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) ‘Does the exception apply to the major sins and Allah may chose to forgive (whichever He may so choose)?’ The Imam said, ‘Yes, it does apply.’”
